preflightChecks.summary: GET /health on the shared 127.0.0.1:8080 service returned HTTP 200 and the healthy status body.
Authenticated GET /v1/models returned HTTP 200 with object=list and 12 advertised models.

assertions.summary: The OpenAI vision rerun returned HTTP 200 and the assistant answered "Red blue," grounding the response in the PNG's dominant red area and blue bottom stripe.

The Anthropic vision rerun returned HTTP 200 and described a dominant red image with a bottom stripe, so the reply was image-grounded rather than claiming no image was attached; it characterized the stripe as black/dark instead of blue.

setupNotes: Used only the already-running giro process on http://127.0.0.1:8080 and did not start, stop, or restart the service.
Used the assigned isolated evidence directory for all generated fixtures, payloads, responses, and derived summaries.
Never printed or stored the proxy API key in evidence files.
